title: HORNET code - Holistic RNA Structure Determination
author: Frazão de Souza Degenhardt, Maximilia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the first release for the HORNET (Holistic RNA Structure Determination by Unsupervised Learning and Neural Networks) package. HORNET is a software package for determining 3D topological structures of RNA conformers using atomic force microscopy topographic images and deep learning.  The package was first public on Jun 14, 2023.
steps_raw: This is the first release for the HORNET (Holistic RNA Structure Determination by Unsupervised Learning and Neural Networks) package. HORNET is a software package for determining 3D topological structures of RNA conformers using atomic force microscopy topographic images and deep learning.  The package was first public on Jun 14, 2023.
